svg.text: Application Gateway (WAF v2) + VNet-Integrated Container Apps + Managed Data Services

g.text: WAF v2 • OWASP 3.2 Prevention • SSL Termination • HTTP→HTTPS Redirect
Host-based routing: webapp / identity-api / webhooksclient / mobile-bff

svg.text: HTTPS to CAE static IP (host-based SNI routing)

g.text: Event Bus — Integration Events (TCP ingress, internal)
Flexible Server • Burstable B2ms • pgvector extension
Basket Session Store • TLS 1.2 • Basic C0
All Container Apps pull images via User-Assigned MI
1. Client sends HTTPS request to App Gateway public IP
3. App Gateway routes via host header to CAE static IP
4. CAE internal LB forwards to correct Container App
5. Internal services communicate over VNet (no public exposure)
Sources: infra/main.bicep, infra/infra.bicep, infra/apps.bicep, infra/modules/*.bicep • All connections derived from Bicep resource definitions
